title: DinnerMod
description: A mod to be like DinnerBone
body:
# DinnerMod Just a mod that make you as DinnerBone, upside down : ![Image 1](https://i.imgur.com/Zsks0EF.png) ![Image 2](https://i.imgur.com/2ul0VrS.png) ![Image 3](https://i.imgur.com/vJx7oUC.png) But this mod adds more.
Thanks to [@Minemobs](https://github.com/Minemobs)
You can also be sideways: ![Image 4](https://i.imgur.com/PFjF1Le.jpeg) ![Image 5](https://i.imgur.com/IMEbW4e.jpeg) Note that it's only visual and only the mod user can see him as upside down
